title: Apterigia pumila
taxonomy: Apterigia pumila is a species of moth in the family Gelechiidae. It is part of the genus Apterigia, which is a group of moths commonly found in the Palearctic region. The classification of Apterigia pumila places it within the phylum Arthropoda, class Insecta, order Lepidoptera, and family Gelechiidae. The order Lepidoptera is further divided into two suborders: Heteroneura and Glossata. This classification provides a comprehensive understanding of Apterigia pumila's position within the larger taxonomic framework.
